notes: Constructive close to Monday: Dow record on the U.S.-Iran de-escalation, VIX calm at 17.6, AMAT at record highs. But cash is near zero ($51), June payrolls land Friday, and memory/chips (MU, SNDK) keep leaking — holding 0.5 with no reach.
journal_entry: Mon 6/29 17:12: held neutral/0.5 into a green record close (VIX 17.6, Iran truce holding). AMAT strong stays favored; MU/SNDK soft and ABCL/FCEL overextended remain no-chase. Cash $51 caps risk; bracing for Friday payrolls and watching whether semis find a floor before adding.
